target.title: feat(agents): add top-level subsystem logger
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds `src/agents/log.ts` exporting a `SubsystemLogger` for the `"agents"` subsystem
- Follows the existing pattern of `src/agents/cli-runner/log.ts` and `src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/logger.ts`
- Provides a shared logger entry point for the agents module; callers can use `log.child("feature")` for `"agents/feature"` sub-loggers

## Verification

No runtime behavior change — this is a new export only. No existing code is modified.

```
src/agents/log.ts  (new, 3 lines)
```
